arts.ttl: January deal was nearly sealed for 39-goal, 22-assist attacker as Romano confirms Liverpool January transfer decision
arts.sum: Liverpool star Darwin Nunez was the subject of two bids from Saudi Pro League giants Al-Nassr during the January transfer window, transfer expert Fabrizio Romano has confirmed. The Uruguayan forward was linked with a move away from Anfield, attracting interest from AC Milan, Al-Hilal, and Al-Nassr. arts.ttl: Analysis: Why Gakpo is thriving on the left wing under Slot
arts.sum: Gakpo now has 16 goals in all competitions this campaign, recovering from a slow start when he did not score in the league until Liverpool ’s 10th match in early November. Gakpo has a fabulous knack for arriving late at the far post to convert right-wing crosses, receiving three assists from Salah in Premier League matches.
